Player data

Main position
Main position:
Centre-Forward
Facts and data
Name in home country: Erling Braut Håland Date of birth/Age: 21/07/2000 (25) Place of birth: Leeds   Height: 1,95 m Citizenship:   Norway Position: Attack - Centre-Forward Foot: left Player agent: Rafaela Pimenta Current club: Manchester City Joined: 01/07/2022 Contract expires: 30/06/2034 Last contract extension: 17/01/2025 Outfitter: Nike Social-Media:
Transfermarkt Videos
Further information
Due to a 15 percent resale participation by Molde, the transfer fee increased to 8 million euros.

Most goals scored by a player in a single match at a FIFA U-20 World Cup (9 goals)

First player in UEFA Champions League history to score six goals in his first three games.

First player in Bundesliga history to score five goals in his first two games.

Erling Haaland is the son of Alf-Inge Haaland (Retired).

Erling Haaland is the cousin of Jonatan Braut Brunes (Raków Częstochowa).

Erling Haaland is the cousin of Albert Tjåland (Rosseland BK).

Youth clubs

Bryne FK (2006-2015)
